questions.text: Which statement best defines Interpreted programming languages?

answers.text: Interpreted programming languages are executed by an interpreter at run time rather than being fully converted into a standalone machine-code executable before execution. Python or JavaScript code is commonly run by a runtime/interpreter rather than shipped only as a precompiled executable.
Compiled programming languages: Compiled programming languages are translated into machine code before execution, typically producing an executable or build artifact.
Markup languages: Markup languages describe document structure or presentation rather than general program execution.
Assembly language: Assembly language uses low-level mnemonics closely tied to processor instructions.

explanations.a: Interpreted programming languages is the tested concept. Interpreted programming languages are executed by an interpreter at run time rather than being fully converted into a standalone machine-code executable before execution. This is the correct answer.
explanations.b: Compiled programming languages would apply when the issue is compiled programming languages are translated into machine code before execution, typically producing an executable or build artifact. The question is asking for Interpreted programming languages: interpreted programming languages are executed by an interpreter at run time rather than being fully converted into a standalone machine-code executable before execution.
explanations.c: Markup languages focuses on markup languages describe document structure or presentation rather than general program execution. Interpreted programming languages is different because interpreted programming languages are executed by an interpreter at run time rather than being fully converted into a standalone machine-code executable before execution.
explanations.d: Assembly language belongs to a nearby Objective 4 concept: assembly language uses low-level mnemonics closely tied to processor instructions. interpreted programming languages are executed by an interpreter at run time rather than being fully converted into a standalone machine-code executable before execution.

questions.text: Which statement best defines Query languages?

answers.text: Markup languages: Markup languages describe document structure rather than ask a database for records.

Query languages are used to request, retrieve, define, or modify data in databases and other data stores. SQL is the common example because it asks a database to select, insert, update, delete, or define data.
Scripting languages: Scripting languages automate actions and program behavior rather than primarily express database operations.
